历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10145 → 10028 → 7708 → 9206 → 9138. In 2023, there was a significant forward shift (7708th), in 2024 it swung back to 9206th, and in 2025 it remained basically flat at 9138th. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 7700–9200, with a baseline of about 9138 in 2025. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 49 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 53 in 2024, 53 in 2025, and 48 in 2026, a reduction of about 9.4% compared to 2025. The reduction is significant, theoretically lowering the difficulty of admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking: 2021 58th → 2022 48th → 2023 52nd → 2024 48th → 2025 48th → 2026 62nd. In recent years, the ranking first rose then fell, dropping to 62nd in 2026, which may slightly weaken its appeal to high-scoring candidates. The school has no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation evaluation documents. The total popularity ranking on Douyin did not enter the top 106, short video exposure is average, and application attention is at a medium level. No obvious enrollment gaps or anomalies were observed. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are the school's traditional advantageous disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included for this school, based on public information), directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, and Resource Exploration Engineering, still attractive to industry-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high. The school's related majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering) have higher admission rankings. Traditional energy majors have stable popularity. The total number of Jilin Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 79,800, slightly down from 80,421 in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. The school is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Jilin candidates. In recent years, the school's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5% (9 out of 598 nationally in 2025), stable with no significant change.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 9138, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.4% (driving ranking forward), the slight decrease in Jilin Province candidate numbers (slightly easing competition), and the decline in Soft Science ranking (slight offset). Considering the weak inhibitory effect of the ranking decline on the high-score segment, after a small correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8601, with a range of 8101–9101.

Candidates in the lower part (8800–9100) are advised to choose Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing engineering majors with industry demand such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class and Safety Engineering.
